blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
